_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of database maintenance principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of relational database management system concepts, including normalization theory, indexing strategies, transaction isolation levels, query execution plans, and performance optimization principles.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Knowledge TF-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-012 (RC, cosine: 0.553), DQ-T-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.549).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.645). Shared vocabulary: [database, knowledge, principles]. NICE-only terms [maintenance, practices] vs WIDAI-only terms [concepts, execution, indexing, isolation, levels, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.910 (P=0.937, R=0.885). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of database maintenance principles and practices" and "Knowledge of relational database management system concepts, including normaliza" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.630 ≈ STS 0.645 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [database, knowledge, principles] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.8%. Shared tokens: [database, knowledge, principles]. NICE-only: [maintenance, practices]. WIDAI-only: [concepts, execution, indexing, isolation, levels, management].
